hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider checks into one audit-ready workflow that supports comprehensive UBO review and risk-based onboarding decisions for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Review gaps slow counterparty UBO approval
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate beneficial ownership data from multiple sources, leading to fragmented reviews and inconsistent risk assessments. This slows onboarding decisions and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible compliance and regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates beneficial ownership data from multiple providers into one unified onboarding workflow that applies risk-based rules, manages reviewer actions and preserves audit-ready evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to UBO approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs through risk-based routing, structured UBO reviews, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for compliance approval workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows, preserving decision evidence and cases to support efficient, auditable counterparty UBO reviews for compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled layer for structured ownership reviews, preserving audit-ready evidence and supporting bank due diligence within secure enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support counterparty UBO review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding checks combine into audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how review history supports risk-based UBO decision making
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for counterparty UBO review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, sanctions, and UBO data into structured onboarding and approval workflows for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure UBO review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates UBO reviews by aggregating provider outputs, applying risk-based routing, enabling policy enforcement, and managing case workflows with audit logs for each review step.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by capturing decision logs, provider results, regulatory triggers and linked documentation within cases to support audit-ready review trails.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC and KYB providers without disruption, integrating their identity, corporate and beneficial ownership checks into connected compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC and KYB providers and does not replace them but turns their outputs into structured workflows, cases and evidence for compliance teams.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB data into structured cases, audit-ready evidence and controlled onboarding decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
